summary: PR 2379 linked the melee/if/ifnametag object by changing configure.py from NonMatching to Matching, updating symbol metadata/local labels for ifnametag-related text/data/sdata/sdata2/bss entries, and adjusting un_802FD4C8 source shape. The bot report records one new match for main/melee/if/ifnametag un_802FD4C8, improving that item from 90.18% to 100.00%. No human review comments or PR body rationale were present in the loaded slice.

key_files.role: Source changes for un_802FD4C8: added inline GObj_Create wrapper, introduced HSD_CObj temp, and changed expression shape around memzero, GObj creation, camera descriptor conversion, and object attachment.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: decomp-dev[bot] report lists main/melee/if/ifnametag un_802FD4C8 as 100.00%

key_files.role: Build/link configuration changed melee/if/ifnametag.c from NonMatching to Matching.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: configure.py hunk changes Object(NonMatching, "melee/if/ifnametag.c") to Object(Matching, "melee/if/ifnametag.c")

key_files.role: Symbol metadata updates for ifnametag-related function scope, local data labels, named local camera descriptor data, local strings, and local float/double constants.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: symbols.txt hunks for NameTag_RenderCallback, nametag_eyepos, nametag_interest, nametag_CObjDesc, @197/@378/@379, @263/@264, @163/@184/@185/@262/@265/@316/@317/@318/@319/@322/@380

what_changed.text: Marked melee/if/ifnametag.c as Matching in configure.py.
Adjusted un_802FD4C8 by adding inline HSD_GObj* un_802FD4C8_inline(int arg0) returning GObj_Create(0xE, arg0, 0).

Changed un_802FD4C8 local/source expression shape: added HSD_CObj* new_var, assigned i inside memzero size argument, assigned gobj through the inline helper, stored lb_80013B14 result in new_var, then passed new_var to HSD_GObjObject_80390A70.
Updated symbols for local scope and local labels across .text, .data, .bss, .sdata, and .sdata2 near ifnametag/ifmagnify/ifstock ranges.
Renamed or localized several ifnametag data entries, including nametag_eyepos, nametag_interest, nametag_CObjDesc, and compiler-style @number literals/constants.

smart_moves.text: The PR paired the source match with configure.py status and symbols.txt metadata changes, which is consistent with linking a previously NonMatching object rather than changing only C source.
Localizing compiler-style literals/constants as @number symbols and marking NameTag_RenderCallback local kept symbol metadata aligned with the linked translation unit boundary.

decomp_lessons.lesson: For object-linking PRs, a successful source match may require synchronized symbol metadata changes for local functions, local labels, and local literals/constants in addition to the C edit and Matching configuration flip.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report records one new match for ifnametag un_802FD4C8

decomp_lessons.lesson: Small expression-shape changes, including preserving an existing PAD_STACK, adding a narrow inline wrapper, splitting a helper result into a temporary, and using assignment within an argument, can be part of the final matching shape for a stubborn function.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report lists un_802FD4C8 at 100.00%

naming_conventions.text: Recovered local ifnametag data names used a nametag_ prefix for semantic local camera-related objects: nametag_eyepos, nametag_interest, nametag_CObjDesc.
Anonymous local literals/constants were represented with compiler-style @number names such as @197, @263, @322, and @380 rather than semantic global un_ names.
NameTag_RenderCallback retained its existing name but gained scope:local metadata.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Added a narrow inline wrapper un_802FD4C8_inline around GObj_Create(0xE, arg0, 0), replacing a direct GObj_Create(HSD_GOBJ_CLASS_UI, 15, 0) call at the callsite.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caution: The slice shows the tactic and the bot match report, but does not include objdiff output explaining why the inline wrapper was necessary.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Introduced HSD_CObj* new_var to hold lb_80013B14((HSD_CameraDescPerspective*) (&nametag_CObjDesc)) before passing it to HSD_GObjObject_80390A70.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caution: Local variable name new_var is mechanically descriptive and may be match-driven; no review discussion explains naming intent.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Changed memzero(un_804D6D70, sizeof(un_804D6D70)) to memzero(un_804D6D70, i = sizeof(un_804D6D70)), reusing the loop counter local in an assignment expression.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caution: This is a match-shape tactic supported by the final bot match report, not a general style recommendation.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Retained PAD_STACK(0x10) in un_802FD4C8 while making the function match.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caution: The diff shows PAD_STACK was already present; this PR does not prove it was newly discovered or generally required.

The source diff added an inline GObj_Create wrapper, a temporary HSD_CObj*, and an assignment expression in the memzero size argument; symbols.txt also localized related function/data/literal/constant metadata.

rejection_notes: Do not generalize the un_802FD4C8_inline wrapper, new_var temporary, or memzero assignment expression as preferred style; the slice only supports them as match tactics in this function.
Do not infer human reviewer approval details or requested changes; there were no loaded human review comments.
Do not claim all symbols.txt localizations were independently validated by objdiff/checkdiff beyond the bot's summarized match/link report.
